name: Black Bean Soup
tagline: Smoky cumin black bean soup, lime crema, and crisp tortilla
highlight: Pantry beans, smoky depth, no eggs needed

hero.alt: Bowl of black bean soup with crema, lime, and cilantro
hero.caption: black bean soup — smoky and bright

healthFacts: Black beans deliver ~15g protein and 15g fiber per cup, with iron and folate.
Cumin + smoked paprika = the smoke flavor without bacon.

steps.title: Soften aromatics
steps.detail: Sweat onion in olive oil 6 minutes. Add garlic, cook 1 minute. Stir in cumin, paprika, chipotle; bloom 30 seconds.
steps.tip: A whole chipotle pepper from the can = smoky punch without overpowering heat.

steps.title: Add beans and stock
steps.detail: Stir in 2 cans of beans (drained), the third with its liquid, and stock. Bring to a simmer for 15 minutes.
steps.tip: The bean liquid (aquafaba) thickens the soup naturally.

steps.title: Partial blend
steps.detail: Blend half the soup until smooth (immersion blender or carefully in batches). Stir back in for body + texture.
steps.tip: Half-blending is the trick to soup that's both creamy and chunky.

steps.title: Lime and finish
steps.detail: Stir in lime juice off heat. Salt to taste. Top with cilantro, sour cream or vegan crema, and tortilla strips.
steps.tip: Tortilla strips: cut tortillas, toss in oil, oven 400°F for 8 minutes.

media.alt: Black bean soup with crema and lime
media.caption: lime and finish
